repo_prior_art.cite: stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax — banked finite monotonicity-loss diagnostics and fixed-record Rosenbaum vertex substrate, though not this signed opposite-tail witness.

published_prior_art.cite: RosenbaumKrieger1990 supplies the one-sided extreme-candidate setting; FogartySmall2016MultipleComparisons proves shared-confounder QCQP gains for multiple outcomes; neither states this particular union-tail witness or reduction.

repo_prior_art.cite: stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax — its open set-mixture/frontier work already establishes finite product-vertex enumeration as the relevant computational substrate.

published_prior_art.cite: Rosenbaum2018Stratified gives a computationally feasible conservative heterogeneous-stratum procedure; ChiuKang2025Contingency gives exact worst-case calibration for a different permutation-invariant contingency-table setting.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 (thm:opposite-tail-capability-separation-and-hardness)
novelty_flags.one_line: The finite counterexample and exact-value hardness result provide neither a new causal estimand estimator with a rate or limit law nor a sharper/first statistical bound, so the Stat kernel is below the requested field-tier frontier.

novelty_flags.label: thm:gamma-one-equality
novelty_flags.one_line: The Gamma=1 reversal equality is already banked in stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax and can only remain a credited regression/sanity result.

novelty_flags.label: prop:gamma-two-gap-witness
novelty_flags.one_line: The d-dagger Gamma=2 gain of 19/120 is already banked in stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax and cannot bear novelty.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1 (oeq:operational-joint-certificate)
soundness_flags.one_line: Permitting exhaustive serial visitation and transcript output makes finite exact calibration and a finite parameter-cell partition follow directly from finite vertex enumeration and comparisons of finitely many rational functions; the stated question has no nontrivial algorithmic guarantee.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1 (oeq:operational-joint-certificate)
soundness_flags.one_line: The ban on retaining an in-memory Cartesian-product array is representation-dependent and has no RAM/Turing memory model, workspace bound, or output-size criterion, so it does not define a mathematical algorithmic property.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Fisher-sharp-null calibration
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: All reported p-value validity and any certified calibration are conditional on the Fisher sharp null and the conditional Rosenbaum product-law model.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Exact shared-law two-tail calibration under the Fisher-sharp-null conditional Rosenbaum model.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Encoded-input computational regime
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The computational target is limited to finite rational scores, threshold, alpha, and Gamma and makes no polynomial-time claim.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Conditional exact arithmetic on the declared finite encoded-input domain, with potentially exponential runtime.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the enumeration-permitting OEQ with a precise nontrivial guarantee: specify a machine model and prove certificate compression, polynomial space with a quantified delay, fixed-parameter tractability in score range/set size, or a rigorously bounded approximation with valid conservative calibration.

Promote the four-score witness to a generic characterization of which two-sided event patterns force non-score-monotone least-favorable laws, and state strict non-representability against the actual published functionals of at least two workflows.

Create a Stat-facing result by pairing a computable joint calibration with a new causal-inference performance theorem—such as finite-sample coverage or a derived asymptotic law/power improvement over a named two-sided matched-study procedure—rather than treating exact enumeration as the contribution.
Keep the Gamma=1 and d-dagger assertions solely as labelled regression checks and remove them from any novelty-bearing result list.

recommended_next_step: Continue revision on this angle: impose a mathematically meaningful computational guarantee and add a genuine statistical-inference frontier result; otherwise pivot away from the serial-enumeration question.
